title: ERP-MES Pharma (ISA-95/ISA-88)
description: Pharmaceutical (solid dosage) overlay for erp-mes-core: quarantine and batch release with electronic signatures (21 CFR Part 11), double verification of dispensing weighments, electronic batch record sections, DataMatrix serialization with aggregation
changelog: 1.2.0 - status-aware job action bar (buttons enabled by dispatch_status); 1.1.1 - form heights calibrated to the real renderer - submit buttons no longer clipped on any operator tab; 1.1.0 - operator UI rework: flat widget format, dropdown selects from catalog reports, row-click autofill, KPI cards, event journal; requires erp-mes-core 1.1.0

changelog.notes: 1.2.0: status-aware job action bar - one widget with Start/Pause/Resume/Complete buttons enabled by the selected job dispatch_status (ISA-95 state machine); requires platform with function.buttonsJson support
1.1.1: form heights calibrated to the real renderer - submit buttons no longer clipped on any operator tab
1.1.0: operator UI rework - flat dashboard widget format (no settingsJson), dropdown selects fed by catalog reports, row-click autofill into forms, KPI value cards, event journal report
Initial release: solid dosage pharma overlay on erp-mes-core 1.0.0, certified by ErpMesPharmaOverlayTest cross-bundle scenarios
